problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
